title: Ontology of LLM-Based Agentic AI
description: An OWL 2 ontology providing a framework-independent, reasoner-verifiable conceptual model for Large Language Model (LLM) based agent systems, aligned with the OASIS 2 foundational agent ontology. Includes SPARQL competency-question queries, a reflection-based framework-independence check (LangChain, CrewAI), and the accompanying paper.
